creator: petefrench@ticketswitch.com
text:
Installing the libdispatch port installs the shared library
	files, but misses the static library libdispatch.a

Fix: 

A workaround is to copy the static library by hand.
How-To-Repeat: 
	Build the port. Observe that inside work/libdispatch-r174/.libs
	both the static and the shared versions of the library have been
	built.

	Install the port. Observer that only the shared library has been
	installed in /usr/local/lib
